// Generated by FrontComposer source generator
// Do not edit directly

#nullable enable

using System;

namespace Counter.Domain.Batch.Operations;

/// <summary>Story 2-3 Decision D4: per-command lifecycle bridge forwarding Fluxor actions to <see cref="global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.ILifecycleStateService"/>.</summary>
public sealed class BulkIncrementCommandLifecycleBridge : global::System.IDisposable
{
    private readonly global::Fluxor.IActionSubscriber _subscriber;
    private readonly global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.ILifecycleStateService _service;

    public BulkIncrementCommandLifecycleBridge(
        global::Fluxor.IActionSubscriber subscriber,
        global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.ILifecycleStateService service)
    {
        _subscriber = subscriber ?? throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(subscriber));
        _service = service ?? throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(service));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.SubmittedAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Submitting, null));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.AcknowledgedAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Acknowledged, a.MessageId));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.SyncingAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Syncing, null));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.ConfirmedAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed, null));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.RejectedAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Rejected, null));
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<BulkIncrementCommandActions.ResetToIdleAction>(this,
            a => _service.Transition(a.CorrelationId, global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.CommandLifecycleState.Idle, null));
    }

    public void Dispose() => _subscriber.UnsubscribeFromAllActions(this);
}
